chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 09 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 56/24 3.For hearing of main case 20-03-2025 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. **** None present for the petitioners; no intimation is received; same was the position on the last date of hearing. Today, SIP Muhammad Saleh of P.S, Memon Goth Malir Karachi is present and files statement, which reflects that FIR was disposed of under A-class and such report was submitted before the concerned Magistrate. Since no one is in attendance on behalf of petition, therefore, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
